violations.text: The doors to the outside, located in the back exit of cafe, entrance to welcome center and the cafe entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Sandwiches, Charcuterie, and Salads were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation and or expiration date. Expiration date shall not exceed ingredient manufacturing dates. Items from venders shall be marked with the expiration date prior to arriving at facility. Establishment shall not receive products that are not properly date marked. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
